heading: Applicability of other laws
label: 855 Applicability of other laws
text: Subject to the policy declared in , the provisions of subsections (6) to (9) of section 608a and of subsections (14) and (15) of , are made applicable in connection with orders issued pursuant to , and the provisions of are made applicable in connection with marketing agreements entered into pursuant to and orders issued pursuant to . The provisions of subsections (a), (b)(2), (c), (f), (h), and (i) of , are made applicable in connection with the administration of this chapter.section 851 of this titlesection 608c of this titlesection 854 of this titlesection 608d of this titlesection 852 of this titlesection 854 of this titlesection 610 of this title
